segments.text: Shout for joy to God, all the earth!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Sing the glory of his name; make his praise glorious.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Say to God,
How awesome are your deeds! So great is your power that your enemies cringe before you.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: All the earth bows down to you; they sing praise to you, they sing the praises of your name.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Come and see what God has done, his awesome deeds for mankind!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He turned the sea into dry land, they passed through the waters on foot—
come, let us rejoice in him.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He rules forever by his power, his eyes watch the nations— let not the rebellious rise up against him.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise our God, all peoples, let the sound of his praise be heard;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He has preserved our lives and kept our feet from slipping.
For you, God, tested us; you refined us like silver.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You brought us into prison and laid burdens on our backs.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You let people ride over our heads; we went through fire and water, but you brought us to a place of abundance.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will come to your temple with burnt offerings and fulfill my vows to you—
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: vows my lips promised and my mouth spoke when I was in trouble.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will sacrifice fat animals to you and an offering of rams; I will offer bulls and goats.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Come and hear, all you who fear God;
let me tell you what he has done for me.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I cried out to him with my mouth; his praise was on my tongue.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: If I had cherished sin in my heart, the Lord would not have listened;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: but God has surely listened and has heard my prayer.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise be to God, who has not rejected my prayer or withheld his love from me!
segments.speaker: Psalmist
